title: Abstract Cosmology (Dominic's Frame)
html:
Stub. First mentioned in 2025 06 21 on bubbas.

The dissociative cosmological frame Dominic speaks in: god is a mushroom, jumping between universes requires suicide, humans have unused telepathic abilities. Yahir flags it as a marker of "more than depression."
